new_patterns_observed: Alert/callout component (Mantine Alert): bg rgba(34,139,230,0.1), 4px radius, no border, info icon on left, title bold colored, body regular
Select filter input with chevron icon + leading icon: 'Filter by rule group state'
Text filter input with leading search icon, 1px solid rgb(206,212,218) border, 4px radius, padding 0 12px 0 34px
input_component_consistency: WARNING: inner <input> elements report 0px border, padding 0 and 0px radius — outer wrapper has 1px solid rgb(206,212,218), 4px radius, padding 0 12px 0 34px (search icon space). This is Mantine composite-input pattern — not a real inconsistency, but composite-input internals should be documented so downstream tooling doesn't pick wrong element.
alerts_section_empty_state: Single Mantine Alert card with info icon + title + body text — looks OK, consistent pattern
